title: Coogam Wooden Intelligence Puzzle 40 Pcs Tangram Jigsaw Brain Teaser Toy for Kids Wood Puzzle Box Brain Game Building Block Intelligence Educational Gift for Toddlers
features: Wooden Intelligence Puzzles are made of natural and healthy basswood with high quality and smooth surface. It contains 40 pieces with a reasonable sized board ( Length: 10.6" Width: 7 " Height: 0.39")

Wooden Toys Tangram Brain Teaser Puzzle Game has several examples for shapes and things to make with it. Each time you mix up the pieces, the puzzle would come out differently, such as pistol, human, robot, tree, umbrella, flower, pyramid, airplane and more
The simple design and bright colors are perfect for sparking any imagination, perfect for times when you or your child just need to calm down or relax
Assembling Russian Blocks use common geometric patterns and colors to keep children busy for different options to play and to add creativity to eye-hand coordination and color & shape recognition
Awesome wooden Intelligence puzzle for kids, and great fidget toy for adults. Perfect ultimate gift idea as Christmas Gift/ Birthday Gift/ Festival Gift
description: Product Description STRENGTHEN YOUR IMAGINATIONS CLASSICAL & CHALLENGING PUZZLE This wooden Intelligence puzzle is colorful indeed. It’s painted really well therefore the color of the wood doesn’t come off at all. Also all the puzzles fit perfectly and there’s no problem in fitting it in different ways. This wooden puzzles and board is very sturdy that when it’s dropped on the floor no parts are broken. Let the puzzle impress you and how it’s sturdy and colorful. FUN TIME !
